panels.description: A sequence of panels showing a man in a lab coat aiming a weapon at a symbiote-covered figure, followed by an overhead view of a green energy blast hitting the figure in a lab.
A large panel showing a massive, black symbiote version of Ben Grimm confronting the man in the lab coat amidst a city background, followed by a close-up of the man's face as he recoils.

text_blocks.text: ...WE WILL FIND ANOTHER WAY. I PROMISE.
text_blocks.speaker: Ben Grimm

text_blocks.text: I DID FIND A WAY... AND NOW YOU WANNA STOP ME BECAUSE YOUR OWN EGO CAN'T STAND THAT YOU'RE NOT THE ONE WHO FIGURED IT OUT.
text_blocks.speaker: Symbiote Ben

text_blocks.text: BEN... THAT'S NOT IT AT ALL. LISTEN TO WHAT YOU'RE SAYING...
text_blocks.speaker: Ben Grimm

page_summary: Ben Grimm attempts to use a specialized weapon against a symbiote-transformed version of himself. The symbiote confronts Ben, accusing him of ego-driven interference, as the transformation causes chaos in the laboratory and urban environment.
